summary: E-commerce website for Digital Marketing Town, a digital marketing agency located in Janakpuri, Delhi. Contact: +91-9717044953. Should use the existing logo and images.
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Replace logo with the newly uploaded official Digital Marketing Town logo (dmti-logo.png > dmti-logo.png)

existing_features.title: Create a visually compelling landing page for 'Digital Marketing Town Institute' — a digital marketing course provider. The page must include: a hero section with the institute name, a bold tagline, and a primary CTA button ('Enroll Now'); a 'Why Choose Us' section highlighting key benefits (e.g., expert instructors, flexible learning, industry-recognized certification); a courses/programs overview section listing digital marketing topics (SEO, Social Media Marketing, PPC, Content Marketing, Email Marketing); a testimonials section with student quotes; a FAQ section with common enrollment questions; and a footer with contact info and social links.

Apply a bold, energetic visual theme suited to a modern digital marketing institute: use a dark navy/charcoal background with vibrant orange and yellow accent colors, clean sans-serif typography, and high-contrast section dividers. Use gradient backgrounds for the hero and CTA sections. Maintain this theme consistently across all sections.

Generate and display the following static image assets on the landing page: a hero banner background image, a logo/brand mark for the institute, and course category icon illustrations. Render them from frontend/public/assets/generated.

Display the institute's contact number (+91-9717044953) and address (Janakpuri, Delhi) prominently on the landing page — at minimum in the Footer's contact info column, and optionally in a dedicated contact section or the hero/CTA area.

Replace the current generated/placeholder logo image in the Navbar and Footer components with the uploaded official Digital Marketing Town Institute logo (dmti-logo.png). The logo shows a blue globe-like swirl icon alongside the text 'Digital Marketing Town INSTITUTE'. Display it at an appropriate size in both components, preserving its aspect ratio. The image must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png.

Add a new 'Gallery / Promotions' section to the landing page that displays the three uploaded promotional images (dmti-promo-1.jpg, dmti-promo-2.jpg, dmti-promo-3.jpg) as a responsive grid or carousel. Place this section between the CoursesOverview and Testimonials sections. Images must be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/ and styled consistently with the existing dark navy/orange theme.

Add a 'Video Highlights' section to the landing page featuring embedded YouTube video placeholders (using 3 representative iframe embeds for digital marketing topics). Since no specific video URLs were provided, use clearly labelled placeholder iframes with a note that URLs can be swapped. Place this section after the Gallery/Promotions section. Style it consistently with the dark navy/orange theme with a section heading like 'Watch & Learn'.

Rebuild the existing landing page into a full agency website for 'Digital Marketing Town' — a digital marketing agency located at Janakpuri C1, Delhi-110058, contact +91-9717044953, email digitalmarketingtown14@gmail.com. The site must clearly position the business as an agency (not just an institute), with a hero section proclaiming the agency's value proposition (e.g., 'Get More Leads & Grow Your Business'), and navigation linking to all sections. Retain the existing dark navy/orange/yellow brand theme.

Add a 'Services' section listing the agency's digital marketing service packages as purchasable/inquiry cards. Each service card must include: a service name, a short description, a price or 'Get Quote' CTA button, and a brief list of deliverables. Services to include: Social Media Marketing, SEO Services, Google Ads / PPC, Meta Ads Campaigns, Responsive Web Design, Web Development, Domain & Hosting. The CTA button on each card should scroll to or open the contact/inquiry form.

Add a 'Contact / Get a Free Consultation' inquiry form section to the website. The form must include fields for: Name, Phone Number, Email, Service Interested In (dropdown), and Message. On submission, the form data should be stored in the backend canister and the user should see a success confirmation message. Display the agency's contact details (+91-9717044953, Janakpuri C1 Delhi-110058, digitalmarketingtown14@gmail.com) alongside the form.

Replace the existing course-focused gallery/promotions section content with the 16 uploaded agency promotional images. Save and serve the following uploaded images from frontend/public/assets/generated/ with these filenames: dmt-promo-social-media.jpg (515406865), dmt-promo-ingredients.jpg (515431247), dmt-promo-attract-customers.jpg (515024738), dmt-promo-balance-business.jpg (515570670), dmt-promo-increase-sales.jpg (515770463), dmt-promo-get-leads.jpg (636801301), dmt-promo-cheap-price.jpg (515100076), dmt-promo-grow-business.jpg (514790683), dmt-promo-car-petrol.jpg (515670932), dmt-promo-moments-minister.jpg (526302368), dmt-promo-ashish-sood.jpg (525365707), dmt-promo-event-1.jpg (488206362), dmt-promo-event-2.jpg (496084659), dmt-promo-event-3.jpg (495279509), dmt-promo-event-4.jpg (532301845). Display the marketing/promotional creatives (dmt-promo-social-media, dmt-promo-ingredients, dmt-promo-attract-customers, dmt-promo-balance-business, dmt-promo-increase-sales, dmt-promo-get-leads, dmt-promo-cheap-price, dmt-promo-grow-business, dmt-promo-car-petrol) in the gallery section as a responsive masonry or grid layout. Display the event/moments photos in a separate 'Our Moments' section with a caption area.

Update the Navbar and Footer to reflect the agency identity. The Navbar should show the Digital Marketing Town logo (dmti-logo.png already at frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png) and navigation links: Home, Services, About, Gallery, Testimonials, Contact. The Footer should display agency contact info (+91-9717044953, Janakpuri C1, Delhi-110058, digitalmarketingtown14@gmail.com, digitalmarketingtown.com), social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Pinterest), a quick links column, and a services column. Remove any institute/course-specific copy and replace with agency-focused copy.

Replace the logo image currently displayed in the Navbar and Footer components with the newly uploaded logo served from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png. Display it at an appropriate size in both components, preserving its aspect ratio.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a landing page for Digital Marketing Town Institute (digital marketing course)
Include contact number +91-9717044953 and address Janakpuri, Delhi on the landing page
Use the provided/uploaded logo image for the institute on the landing page
Add a photo (uploaded by user) to the landing page
Add videos to the landing page
Build an e-commerce website (not just a landing page) for Digital Marketing Town agency
Include product/service listings with purchase or inquiry functionality (e-commerce features)

Add a backend Motoko actor function to store and retrieve client inquiry submissions. The actor must expose: (1) a `submitInquiry` update function accepting name, phone, email, service, and message fields, returning a success confirmation; (2) a `getInquiries` query function returning all stored inquiries. Use a stable array or stable HashMap for persistence across upgrades.
